channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Justice Department mistakenly discloses sealed special counsel report related to Trump classified documents case
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has inadvertently released a sealed portion of former special counsel Jack Smith’s investigative report concerning former President Donald Trump. The released mate...

item.title: Claire Boscher’s Frozen Flower Pops Blend Flowers and Ice in Surreal AI-Assisted Art
item.description: Claire Boscher presents a visually striking series titled “Frozen Flower Pops,” an artistic exploration that transforms floral imagery into surreal, ice-bound compositions. Known for her ability to ca...

item.title: Lewis Hamilton speaks about his relationship with Kim Kardashian during Silverstone appearance ahead of British Grand Prix
item.description: Lewis Hamilton made a public reference to his relationship with Kim Kardashian during a fan stage appearance at Silverstone ahead of the British Grand Prix. Speaking alongside fellow Formula 1 drivers...

item.title: UDA revises party constitution and seeks public input ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: The United Democratic Alliance (UDA), which is the ruling party in Kenya, has announced amendments to its party constitution as part of its ongoing internal reforms ahead of the 2027 General Election....

item.title: ECOWAS Court orders Ghana to pay damages over unlawful passport revocation case
item.description: The ECOWAS Community Court of Justice has ordered the Republic of Ghana to pay N21 million in damages to a Ghanaian-born woman, Mary Omerere, after ruling that her fundamental rights were violated whe...

item.title: Conservative backlash erupts over NYC heat wave energy-saving air conditioning guidance
item.description: The article describes a political and cultural controversy sparked by energy conservation recommendations issued during a severe heat wave in New York City. Mayor Zohran Mamdani advised residents to h...

item.title: Government launches Makambako–Songea road upgrade to strengthen southern transport corridor
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has officially launched the construction of a new section of the Makambako–Songea road, a key transport route linking the Njombe and Ruvuma regions. The road, which has serv...

item.title: ASUU issues strike warning affecting 11 state universities over unpaid allowances
item.description: The Academic Staff Union of Universities (ASUU) has issued a fresh warning of a possible indefinite strike that could disrupt academic activities in 11 state-owned universities across Nigeria. The aff...

item.title: Raja Jackson sentenced to jail and probation after assault during pro-wrestling event
item.description: Raja Jackson, the son of former UFC champion Quinton “Rampage” Jackson, has been taken into custody in Los Angeles County to serve a court-approved 90-day jail sentence related to a violent incident a...

item.title: Federal and state investigators examine alleged 'ghost candidate' case in Alaska Senate race
item.description: Federal and state authorities are investigating a contested U.S. Senate race in Alaska involving two candidates with the same name, Dan Sullivan. According to reporting cited in the article, the Alask...

item.title: Court of Appeal imposes detention sentences on boys convicted of raping teenage girls in Hampshire
item.description: Two boys convicted of raping two teenage girls in Fordingbridge, Hampshire have had their non-custodial sentences replaced with four-year detention orders following a Court of Appeal ruling. The case ...

item.title: Google and Amazon Emissions Rise as AI Expansion Strains Climate Goals
item.description: Recent sustainability reports from Google and Amazon reveal a significant increase in their carbon emissions, raising concerns about the environmental cost of the rapid expansion of artificial intelli...

item.title: Jeanine Pirro interrupts reporter during press conference announcing federal indictment tied to Lincoln Memorial case
item.description: U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro drew attention during a press conference held on Thursday after sharply interrupting a reporter’s question while announcing a federal indictmen...

item.title: Teenager charged with attempted murder after woman injured in Linwood car incident
item.description: An 18-year-old teenager has appeared in court in Scotland charged with attempted murder following an incident in which a 49-year-old woman was struck by a car in Linwood, Renfrewshire. The alleged inc...

item.title: Single bettor wins ₱57.6 million Lotto 6/42 jackpot in Laguna, PCSO confirms
item.description: A lone bettor from Laguna province has won the Lotto 6/42 jackpot worth ₱57,645,619.60 in the draw held on Thursday night, July 2, 2026, according to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). ...

item.title: Lahore police launch investigation after abduction and assault of two foreign women; suspects arrested
item.description: Lahore police have registered a case against five suspects in connection with the abduction and alleged sexual assault of two foreign women in the provincial capital. According to police officials, th...

item.title: Former security guard jailed after impersonating G4S staff to steal £117,200 from London bank
item.description: A former private security guard has been jailed after using his old uniform to impersonate a G4S custodian and trick bank staff into handing over £117,200 in cash during a calculated fraud at a Santan...

item.title: Minister clarifies no fabric approved for NYSC uniform replacement after Adire remarks
item.description: The Minister of Youth Development, Ayodele Olawande, has clarified and withdrawn his earlier statement suggesting that Adire fabric could be considered for replacing the National Youth Service Corps (...

item.title: Political scientist warns of alleged DOJ–Maduro negotiation tied to 2020 election interference claims
item.description: The article reports on comments made by political scientist Norman Ornstein regarding what he describes as a concerning and unfolding scenario involving the U.S. Department of Justice under the Trump ...

item.title: Conservative commentator criticizes pastor over comments on interracial family and birthright citizenship ruling
item.description: A conservative media figure, John Podhoretz, sparked controversy after sharply criticizing pastor Joel Webbon over remarks related to his interracial family and views on citizenship. The dispute began...
